Privacy Policy

Effective date:

May 28, 2025

Table of contents

Heading 2
Heading 3
Heading 4
Heading 5
Heading 6

At New England Pickleball Club (“we,” “us,” or “our”), your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains what personal information we collect, how we use it, and what choices you have regarding your data.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect and store the following types of information:

  • Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, or other contact details submitted through forms.
  • Membership Details: Information submitted when joining or requesting information about our club.
  • Website Usage Data: IP address, browser type, referring/exit pages, and other analytical data via Google Analytics or similar tools.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the data collected to:

  • Respond to inquiries and manage membership requests
  • Communicate with you about lessons, programs, and updates
  • Improve our website and user experience
  • Comply with legal obligations

3. Sharing Your Information

We do not sell or rent your data. We may share data with trusted third parties (e.g., hosting services, analytics providers) as needed for business operations, under strict data protection agreements.

4. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

  • Access or correct your data
  • Request deletion of your information
  • Opt out of marketing communications

To exercise your rights, contact us at [insert email].

5. Data Security

We implement reasonable safeguards to protect your information, but no method of transmission is 100% secure.

6. Updates

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised date.

7. Contact

For questions or concerns, contact:

New England Pickleball Club

329 N Main St

Middleton, MA 01949

Middleton@Nepclub.com
